#229

1902-001 (1)
Fauguer Co.

(1902-001
SF# 229 + 443
8 Plats - Harris Holder, Great Run, Home Truck, Marsh Farm, etc.
Faug. Co. John Fox, 4/5/1859

NOTE: Sints #229 + #443 were hopelessly
intermingled at time of processing. Thus,
we have gained the 3 suits since parties
are the same in both suits.
6 BROWN FOLDERS
White folders 1-58
BROWN FOLDER #1/6
White folders 1-8/58
1/58 Bill
2/58 Answer
3/58 ) Relations
4/58 )
6/58
7/58
8/58
} Decrees, etc

NOTE: Plaintiff's List is taken from
1) 1859 John Fox Inv. of Slaves
2) 1877 Comr. Report of Legatne List
SEE ALSO FAUQ CO. PROBATE RECORDS
FROM CLERKS LOOSE PAPER
EX 42 1860-001 TO 1872-001
Blackwell + Fox Est Papers

TACKETT, BALDWIN, JENNINGS, DOWDY, FREMAN, CRAWFORD,
BURNS, MORPIE V, CARPENTER, MUDD, THOMAS, NEALE,
CORBIN, LONG, FOX, THOMSON, BARBER, BATTER,
DUNCAN, MOORE, LONG, STE WART, WALDEN,
HANIDAN, RALLEN, BLINK, CHAPMAN, BRANSON,
MOZERS, WHITMORE, SNOWDEN, PARKER, WREN,
POLLARD, MENIFEE, MORSON, RATCLIFFE,
THOMPSON, YOUNT, HOUCK, NEWBY, BAILEY,
WEST, NEALE, WILLIAMS, WOOD, WASHINGTON,
FISHER, JAMES, DUNKIN, JOHN, EDMOND, ISAAC,
MORGAN, CLAYN, THORNTON, CLINTON, OBEIDAH,
REDECCAN, TOM'S, RACHOLN, JAMES, WILLIAMS,
DELIAN, HENRIETTA, CYRENE, LUCIDAN,
AMYN, MARY ELLIAN, SABAN AMAN, ANTHONYN,
GEORGEN, PAREN, SAMUEL MARY FRANCESN

AWA Fox's Decrees v. Fox Admr.
Tackett, Eli
Baldwin, Washington
Jennings, Willis
Dowdy, Thos.
+ als. *
v.
Philips, John P.
Clifton, Charles P.
Admrs. w.w.a. of
John Fox, deed.
Wm M. Hume (decd)
J.W. James
John A Seaton
Admrs. of John Fox,
decd
* See Pltfs. on inside of brown folder #1.

transcribe_handwriting.text:
1902-001 (1)  
Fauguer Co.

(1902-001  
SF# 229 + 443  
Slaves  
8 Plats - Harris Holder, Great Run, Home Tract, Marsh Farm, &c.
Faug. Co. John Fox, 4/5/1859

NOTE: Suits #229 + #443 were hopelessly intermingled at time of processing. Thus, we have joined the 2 suits since parties are the same in both suits.  
6 Brown Folders  
White folders 1-58  

BROWN FOLDER #1/6  
White folders 1-8/58  
1/58 Bill  
2/58 Answer  
3/58 P. Relations  
4/58 R.F. Relations  
6/58  
7/58  
8/58 Decrees, &c

NOTE: Plntf's List is taken from  
1) 1859 John Fox Inv. of Slaves  
2) 1877 Comr. Report of Legatee List  
SEE ALSO FAUQ CO. PROBATE RECORDS  
FROM CLERKS LOOSE PAPER  
BK #2 1860-001 TO 1872-001  
Blackwell & Fox Est Papers

Tackett, Baldwin, Jennings, Dowdy, Freman, Crawford  
Burns, Murphy, Carpenter, Mudd, Thomas, Neale,  
Corbin, Long, Fox, Thomson, Barber, Ratler,  
Duncan, Moore, Long, Stewart, Walden,  
Hamidan, Rallen, Blink, Chapman, Branson,  
Mozers, Whitmore, Snowden, Parker, Wren,  
Pollard, Menifee, Morson, Ratcliffe,  
Thompson, Yount, Houck, Newby, Bailey,  
West, Neale, Williams, Wood, Washington,  
Fisher, James, Dunkin, John, Edmond, Isaac,  
Morgan, Clayn, Thornton, Clinton, Obediah,  
Redeccan, Tom's, Racholn, James, Williams,  
Delilan, Henrietta, Cyrene, Lucindan,  
Amyn, Mary Ellen, Sarah Ann, Anthoryn,  
Georgen, Paten, Samuel Mary Francesn

AKA Fox's Devices v. Fox's Admr.  
Tackett, Eli  
Baldawin, Washington  
Jennings, Willis  
Dowdy, Thos.  
+ als. *  
v.
Philips, John P.  
Clifton, Charles P.  
Admrs. w.w.a. of   
  John Fox, decd.
Wm M. Hume (decd)  
J.W. James  
John A Seaton  
Admrs. of John Fox, decd.  
* see plntfs on inside of brown folder #1.
